prerequisites: A SmartEngage account with access to the SmartEngage Dashboard.
A SmartEngage API key, viewed and managed in the SmartEngage Dashboard.
Outbound HTTPS access to the SmartEngage API base URL https://api.smartengage.com/ (plain HTTP calls fail).

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: SmartEngage authenticates requests with an API key. Provide it in the connector's api_key field. SmartEngage performs authentication via bearer auth, sending the key as an Authorization: Bearer {api-key} header. Requests without authentication fail.

setupSteps.title: Get your API key from the SmartEngage Dashboard
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your SmartEngage account and open the SmartEngage Dashboard, where you can view and manage your API keys. SmartEngage API keys are prefixed with se_ (for example, se_k73DUceVnvRCusWxDN2qQQ1a).

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the API key in the connector's required api_key field. This is the only credential the connector needs. The connector sends it as an Authorization: Bearer {api-key} header against the base URL https://api.smartengage.com/.

setupSteps.title: Confirm connectivity
setupSteps.body: All requests are made over HTTPS; calls over plain HTTP fail, and requests without authentication fail. Verify the key is valid by allowing the connector to read a SmartEngage resource (the API is REST-based, returning JSON-encoded responses).
